response.overview: Ivy and Eyla accompany Josh to the left, where this threesome gets to know each other much better. Candee and Zazie are surprised to find dildos laying around, but lucky for Erik they don't mind. In danger of being fired, Ellie and Liz decide they'll do whatever they can to impress their boss. Selva and Miss Olivia meet in The Loft for some girl time, but are happy to have Josh join them.
response.title: The Loft 3
